text.title: Glossary Management — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a glossary entry, intake record, and conflict-resolution record. Agent or BA maintaining the glossary must satisfy these contracts.

forbidden.pattern: term that is its own definition ("Active Customer: a customer who is active")
circular alias chain (A aliases B, B aliases A; or longer cycle)
canonical entry with zero propagation_hooks (orphan term)
two canonical entries with identical term + identical scope (duplicate)
scope value not from the project's documented bounded-context list
conflict_with field populated without a corresponding conflict-resolution-record

allowed-transformations.transformation: Merge two near-duplicate entries (e.g., "user" and "end-user") with the same scope — the surviving entry takes both as aliases.
Split a single entry into two scoped entries when conflict resolution outcome is "split".
Promote a proposed entry to canonical AFTER first use in a PRD or spec with the maintainer's review.

section.title: Self-check checklist (run on every entry edit)

list.item: Scope is set and matches a documented bounded context (r2)
Definition does not reference itself (no circularity)
If conflicts_with is set, conflict-resolution-record exists with date + decision (r3)
If status=deprecated, replaced_by points to a canonical entry (r4)
At least one propagation_hook is set (r5)
Owner is a single named individual
last_reviewed is current OR explicitly stale-flagged for review
